ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the accident */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the accident */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the accident */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the accident */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the accident */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the accident (e.g., 1 for minor, 2 for major) */,
  "num_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the accident */,
  "accident_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the accident (e.g., QQ, 31) */,
  "road_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road configuration */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "road_surface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road surface */,
  "road_alignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road alignment */,
  "traffic_control_id" TEXT /* ID of the traffic control */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the accident location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the accident location */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_road_surface_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_surface_id") REFERENCES road_surfaces ("road_surface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_traffic_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_control_id") REFERENCES traffic_controls ("traffic_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_road_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_config_id") REFERENCES road_configs ("road_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_road_alignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("road_alignment_id") REFERENCES road_alignments ("road_alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the accident */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the accident */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_versions_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the vehicle was involved in */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_year" TEXT /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the person was involved in */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the person (M for male, F for female) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the person */,
  "person_position" INTEGER /* Position of the person in the vehicle (e.g., 11 for driver) */,
  "injury_severity" INTEGER /* Injury severity of the person (e.g., 1 for minor, 2 for major) */,
  "safety_equipment" TEXT /* Type of safety equipment used (e.g., 2 for seatbelt) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., 1 for driver, U for unknown) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persons_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_configs" (
  "road_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road configuration */,
  "road_config_name" TEXT /* Name of the road configuration (e.g., 2 for intersection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., 1 for clear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_surfaces" (
  "road_surface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road surface */,
  "road_surface_name" TEXT /* Name of the road surface (e.g., 1 for dry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_surface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_alignments" (
  "road_alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road alignment */,
  "road_alignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the road alignment (e.g., 1 for straight) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_alignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_controls" (
  "traffic_control_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each traffic control */,
  "traffic_control_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic control (e.g., UU for no control, 18 for stop sign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., 1 for car, 20 for truck) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investigator, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., accident, vehicle, person) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
